title: Rohan's Animal Friends Feel Happy
synopsis: Baby Rohan discovers different animals and the happy sounds they make, creating a joyful pattern of animal friends expressing their feelings through delightful sounds and movements.

pages.text: Rohan sees puppy. Puppy feels happy!

illustration.description: A chubby-cheeked baby boy with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on soft green grass, pointing excitedly at a golden retriever puppy. The puppy has a big smile with tongue hanging out, tail wagging. Soft pastel yellows and greens create a sunny, gentle atmosphere with rounded, simple shapes.
illustration.alt: Baby Rohan pointing at a happy golden puppy

illustration.description: The golden puppy is mid-jump with all four paws off the ground, mouth open in a joyful bark. Rohan claps his hands with delight, his eyes wide and sparkling. Motion lines around the puppy show bouncing movement. Warm orange and yellow tones create energy and happiness.
illustration.alt: Happy puppy jumping while baby Rohan claps

pages.text: Rohan sees kitty. Kitty feels happy!

illustration.description: A fluffy white and gray striped kitten sits near Rohan, who reaches out gently with one small hand. The kitten's green eyes are half-closed in contentment, with a small pink nose. Soft lavender and cream colors create a peaceful, cozy feeling with gentle rounded edges.
illustration.alt: Baby Rohan reaching toward a content striped kitten

illustration.description: The kitten rubs against Rohan's leg affectionately while he giggles, his mouth open in pure joy. Small heart shapes float around them to show love and warmth. The kitten's tail is curved in a happy S-shape. Soft pink and cream pastels create a tender, loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Striped kitten snuggling against giggling baby Rohan

pages.text: Rohan sees bunny. Bunny feels happy!

illustration.description: A plump white bunny with long floppy ears sits upright in a patch of colorful spring flowers. Rohan crawls toward the bunny with excitement, his arms outstretched. The bunny's pink nose twitches with curiosity. Gentle blues and soft whites with tiny flower spots create a dreamy garden setting.
illustration.alt: Baby Rohan crawling toward a white bunny in flowers

illustration.description: The white bunny is captured mid-hop with back legs extended, ears flying up from the motion. Rohan sits and bounces excitedly, mimicking the bunny's movement. Dotted lines show the bunny's hopping path. Light green and yellow pastels create a playful, bouncy feeling.
illustration.alt: White bunny hopping while baby Rohan bounces along

pages.text: Rohan sees birdie. Birdie feels happy!

illustration.description: A bright red cardinal perches on a low tree branch while Rohan looks up from below, shading his eyes with his tiny hand. The bird has a cheerful expression with bright black eyes. Soft blue sky background with gentle white clouds creates an uplifting, airy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Baby Rohan looking up at a red cardinal in a tree

illustration.description: The cardinal has its beak open in song with small musical notes floating in the air. Rohan claps his hands and looks up with wonder, his mouth forming a small 'o' of amazement. The tree branch has small green leaves, and everything has a musical, joyful energy with warm golden tones.
illustration.alt: Red cardinal singing while baby Rohan claps and listens

pages.text: All friends feel happy! Rohan feels happy too!

illustration.description: All the animal friends surround smiling Rohan in a gentle circle - the golden puppy, striped kitten, white bunny, and red cardinal. Everyone has joyful expressions with hearts and stars floating above them. Rainbow pastel colors blend together creating the ultimate happy, loving scene with Rohan at the center.
illustration.alt: Baby Rohan surrounded by all his happy animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the puppy make?
questions.explanation: The puppy says 'Woof woof!' when it feels happy!

questions.question: Which animal hops and bounces?
questions.explanation: The bunny goes 'Hop hop!' and bounces around!

questions.question: What does the birdie do when happy?
questions.explanation: The birdie feels happy and sings 'Tweet tweet!'
